Interface ITier

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a network tier.

[Guid("7BEB8997-EE1D-4F7C-A6C5-A428F08115B9")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITier

Properties

AggregatedLinesForSubnetLine

Returns the lines aggregated into SubnetLine Feature Class.

IArray AggregatedLinesForSubnetLine { get; }

Property Value

IArray
